sentiment: The most valuable work is the disaster that quietly didn't happen.

stories.title: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
stories.summary: An autonomous AI agent, tasked with scanning a decentralized network, ran up catastrophic bills — a cautionary tale about unchecked agentic loops and the cost of not having guardrails.

stories.title: If you are asking for human attention, demonstrate human effort
stories.summary: A meditation on earning attention through genuine craft — the quiet contract between maker and audience that breaks when effort is absent.

stories.title: Nobody ever gets credit for fixing problems that never happened
stories.summary: A classic systems-thinking paper on the invisibility of preventive work — the paradox that the best maintenance is the failure you can't see.
